description_en_hint: Describe as a Thule accessory for bicycle wall mounting holder and never mention roof rack, car, automotive, dachowy, roof, or samochodowy.
description_pl_hint: Opisz jako akcesorium Thule do sciennego uchwytu rowerowego i nigdy nie wspominaj o dachu, samochodzie ani bagazniku dachowym.
prompt_notes: Use bicycle wall mounting wording only for Thule products.

description_en_hint: Describe as a video game for the relevant console or PC, intended for household use.
description_pl_hint: Opisz jako gre wideo na odpowiednia konsole lub PC, przeznaczona do uzytku domowego.
prompt_notes: For games, include the platform when it is available.

description_en_hint: Describe as a vinyl record for music playback, intended for household use.
description_pl_hint: Opisz jako plyte winylowa do odtwarzania muzyki w uzytku domowym.
prompt_notes: Do not mention PVC or hazardous material wording.

description_en_hint: Describe as a Blu-ray disc for video playback, intended for household use.
description_pl_hint: Opisz jako plyte Blu-ray do odtwarzania wideo w uzytku domowym.

description_en_hint: Describe the textile or sewing accessory and its household use.

description_en_hint: Describe as a jigsaw puzzle with the piece count when available, intended for household use.
